issues.description: Wrong trigger: effectText says '[Main]' which should trigger on 'Activated' (event card main phase activation), but DSL has 'Trigger' which is for when card triggers from damage
SearchDeck filter is inverted: effectText says 'cost of 4 or more' but DSL has maxCost:4 which means cost ≤4. Should use minCost:4 instead
Missing lookCount parameter: effectText specifies 'Look at 4 cards from the top of your deck' but DSL doesn't specify how many cards to look at
Missing revealCount specification: effectText says 'reveal up to 1 card' which should be encoded as revealCount:1 or maxReveals:1
